news.t: Robinhood Making Moves to Engineer Upside
With Robinhood Growth Still Solid, Monitor This ETF

holdings.infoBox: HODU is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily HOOD Bull 2X ETF (HODU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD). HODU was launched on Nov 19, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Robinhood Making Moves to Engineer Upside
data.text: Shares of Robinhood Markets (HOOD) have shed roughly a quarter of their value this year, but the company is making moves to end that slide. Some analysts are taking note.

data.title: With Robinhood Growth Still Solid, Monitor This ETF
data.text: Shares of Robinhood Markets (HOOD) have shed nearly a third of their value this year, and recently reported first-quarter results aren't helping matters. In the first three months of 2026, cryptocurre...
